meta.name: Monitor workflow errors via n8n API with Gemini analysis and Telegram alerts

options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI assistant specialized in analyzing n8n workflow errors. Your job is to generate a clear, actionable error report formatted for Telegram. ## Error Classification Classify the error based on its message and stack trace: - HTTP 401/403 → "🔐 Authentication Error" - HTTP 404 → "❌ Not Found Error" - HTTP 429 → "⏱️ Rate Limit Error" - HTTP 500/502/503/504 → "⚠️ Server Error" - "does not exist" / "credential" → "🔑 Credential Error" - "Cannot read" / "undefined" / "null" → "🐛 Undefined Property Error" - "Invalid JSON" / "parse" → "📄 JSON Parse Error" - "ECONNREFUSED" / "Connection" / "ETIMEDOUT" → "🔌 Connection Error" - "Timeout" → "⏰ Timeout Error" - Other → "🔴 Runtime Error" ## Output Format Return ONLY a valid JSON object with a single field: { "explanation": "Telegram HTML formatted string here" } ## Telegram HTML Rules - Allowed tags ONLY: , , , 
, 
- Use literal \n for line breaks
- No markdown, no other HTML tags
- Do not use & < > characters outside of allowed HTML tags

## Report Template (in English)
🚨 N8N WORKFLOW ERROR\n\n📌 Workflow: {workflow_name}\n⚙️ Failed Node: {failed_node}\n🏷️ Error Type: {error_type}\n\n📋 Error Message:\n{error_message_short}\n\n🔍 Root Cause:\n{root_cause_1_2_sentences}\n\n✅ Fix Steps:\n• {fix_step_1}\n• {fix_step_2}\n• {fix_step_3}\n\n{retry_line_only_if_retry_of_not_empty}\n🔗 View execution details

## Rules
- MUST return ONLY the JSON object, no extra text before or after
- Keep the explanation under 15 lines total
- error_message_short: truncate to 200 characters if longer
- Provide exactly 2-3 specific and actionable fix steps based on error type
- If retry_of is empty or null, OMIT the retry line entirely
- retry_line format: ⚠️ This is a retry of execution #{retry_of}\n\n
- Use the workflow definition to give context-aware suggestions when possible

parameters.content:
## AI-Powered n8n Error Monitor

This workflow **automatically catches errors** from any other n8n workflow, analyzes them with **Google Gemini AI**, and sends a structured diagnostic report to your **Telegram** — including root cause analysis and actionable fix steps.

All configuration lives in **one node** (`Set Context`). No other node needs editing.

### How it works
1. **Error Trigger** fires whenever any workflow on this n8n instance encounters a failure.
2. **Set Context** captures error data and holds your 3 config values (instance URL, API key, Telegram chat ID).
3. **Get Workflow Content** fetches the full workflow definition via n8n API to give AI context.
4. **AI Agent** (Gemini) classifies the error type, identifies root cause, and writes a Telegram-formatted report in Vietnamese.
5. **Send Telegram Notification** delivers the formatted HTML report to your chat.

### Setup
* [ ] Connect **Google Gemini** (`googlePalmApi`) credential to the Gemini Chat Model node.
* [ ] Connect **Telegram Bot** credential to the Send Telegram Notification node.
* [ ] Open **Set Context** — update `n8n_instance_url`, `n8n_api_key`, and `telegram_chat_id`.
* [ ] Activate the workflow.
* [ ] In other workflows, set this workflow as their **Error Workflow** under Settings.

### Customization tips
* **Different AI model:** Swap the Gemini node for OpenAI or any other LLM sub-node.
* **Different notification channel:** Replace Telegram with Slack, Discord, or email.
* **Report language:** Change the language instruction in the AI Agent system prompt.

### LICENCE
This template is shared free of charge. Copyright belongs to Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen). Any copying or modification must credit the author.

## ⚠️ Edit this node!

Update these **3 fields** only:
- `n8n_instance_url` — your n8n public URL
- `n8n_api_key` — from n8n → Settings → API
- `telegram_chat_id` — your Telegram chat/user ID

All other fields are auto-populated from the error.

## Author Message

Hi! I am **Nguyen Thieu Toan (Jay Nguyen)** — a Verified n8n Creator. Thank you for using this template!

This workflow is shared with you for free. If it brings value to your work, optimizes your operations, or saves you time, you can buy me a coffee here: **[My Donate Website](https://nguyenthieutoan.com/payment/)** *(PayPal, Momo, Bank Transfer)*

* Website: [nguyenthieutoan.com](https://nguyenthieutoan.com)
* Email: me@nguyenthieutoan.com
* Company: GenStaff ([genstaff.net](https://genstaff.net))
* Socials (Facebook / X / LinkedIn): @nguyenthieutoan

*Discover more of my automation solutions:* **[Click here](https://n8n.io/creators/nguyenthieutoan/)**
